
### reading a value without really reading it  {.smaller}


```c
char *array;
posix_memalign(&array, CACHE_SIZE, CACHE_SIZE);
AccessAllOf(array);
if (something false) {
    other_array[mystery * BLOCK_SIZE] += 1;
}
for (int i = 0; i < CACHE_SIZE; i += BLOCK_SIZE) {
    if (CheckIfSlowToAccess(&array[i])) {
        ...
    }
}

```
 

* if branch mispredicted, cache access may <em>still happen</em>
* so can find the value of <code>mystery</code> despite `if`
